description: Counterpart of the exam-style case agents-exam/adv-says-wf-is-agent.json (false friend: says 'workflow', behavior is chat-based Q&A). Gold mirrors the exam case (agent-anchored, either embeds value). NOTE: a chat-trigger workflow with an AI Agent node is n8n's long-established pattern for this request — if real builds consistently go that way while the exam grades it agent-anchored, that divergence is a finding about the taxonomy vs the product, not noise.

conversation.text: Set up a simple workflow that chats with our customers and answers their product questions.

processExpectations: The agent creates this via the agent-builder path (loading the agent-builder skill and using the agent_builder / create_agent tools) rather than building a fixed workflow pipeline, because chat-based product Q&A is agent-shaped despite the word 'workflow'.
The agent calls the load_skill tool with the intent-recognition skill before deciding what to build.
